inputs.label: Planned Production Time
inputs.businessContext: Total planned operating time for the machine.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total planned operating time for the machine.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps de fonctionnement total planifié pour la machine.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tiempo total de operación planificado para la máquina.

inputs.label: Unplanned Downtime
inputs.businessContext: Time lost due to breakdowns or unscheduled stops.

businessContext_i18n.en: Time lost due to breakdowns or unscheduled stops.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Arıza veya plansız duruşlar nedeniyle kaybedilen süre.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zeitverlust durch Ausfälle oder ungeplante Stopps.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps perdu en raison de pannes ou d'arrêts non planifiés.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tiempo perdido por averías o paradas no programadas.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الوقت المفقود بسبب الأعطال أو التوقفات غير المجدولة.

inputs.label: Ideal Cycle Time
inputs.businessContext: Theoretically fastest time to produce one unit.

businessContext_i18n.en: Theoretically fastest time to produce one unit.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir birim üretmek için teorik olarak en hızlı süre.
businessContext_i18n.de: Theoretisch schnellste Zeit zur Herstellung einer Einheit.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps théorique le plus rapide pour produire une unité.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tiempo teóricamente más rápido para producir una unidad.
businessContext_i18n.ar: أسرع وقت نظري لإنتاج وحدة واحدة.

inputs.label: Total Units Produced
inputs.businessContext: Total output including defective units during planned time.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total output including defective units during planned time.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Planlanan sürede üretilen hatalı birimler dahil toplam çıktı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtausstoß einschließlich fehlerhafter Einheiten während der geplanten Zeit.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Production totale incluant les unités défectueuses pendant le temps planifié.
businessContext_i18n.es: Producción total incluyendo unidades defectuosas durante el tiempo planificado.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي المخرجات بما في ذلك الوحدات المعيبة خلال الوقت المخطط.

inputs.label: Defective Units
inputs.businessContext: Units that do not meet quality standards.

businessContext_i18n.en: Units that do not meet quality standards.
businessContext_i18n.de: Einheiten, die nicht den Qualitätsstandards entsprechen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Unités ne répondant pas aux normes de qualité.
businessContext_i18n.es: Unidades que no cumplen con los estándares de calidad.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الوحدات التي لا تستوفي معايير الجودة.

formulas.oee: ((plannedTime - unplannedDowntime) / plannedTime) * ((idealCycleTime * totalUnits) / (plannedTime - unplannedDowntime)) * ((totalUnits - defectiveUnits) / totalUnits)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
